title: Agent Markdown Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of agent markdown files in agents/**/*.md. Consumed by meta-agent-scaffolder at creation and meta-agent-arch-doc-reviewer at validate time. Name pattern enforces the Primitive Selection Framework scope prefix convention.

name.description: Kebab-case name with a framework scope prefix. Enforces PSF category discipline.

description.description: One-line description used for graph registry and skill auto-invocation matching.

tools.description: Explicit tool allowlist. Read-only agents list Read, Bash, Glob, Grep only.

disallowedTools.description: Tool blocklist. Belt-and-braces with tools allowlist; always contains Edit/Write/WebFetch for blocking reviewers.

effort.description: Reasoning effort level. Only valid with model=opus (enforced by conditional).

memory.description: Memory tier the agent participates in.

skills.description: Skills preloaded into the subagent at startup.

isolation.description: Only valid value is 'worktree'. Required for all auto-fixer agents that edit code.

background.description: If true, runs as a non-blocking background agent.

scope.description: Whether the agent is always active or only when a matching language profile is present.

overlay.description: If true, this agent file overlays a plugin-canonical base agent of the same name.

pack.description: Feature pack this agent belongs to. Core is always active; language packs auto-activate on detection; others are user-selected via /setup. Inactive packs have agents set to disable-model-invocation: true.

tier.description: R/R/W specialization tier. 'read' = scanners/profilers/extractors (forbidden from Edit/Write/NotebookEdit); 'reason' = analysts/planners/gap-analyzers (also forbidden from Edit/Write/NotebookEdit); 'write' = scaffolders/reviewers/auto-fixers (full tool access). 'read-reason-write' is a sanctioned exception for small pipeline agents where splitting would be over-engineering (e.g. closed-loop-transcript-todo-extractor). All agents should declare a tier; retrofitting existing agents happens in Phase 5.
